SecuGen.FDxSDKPro

Class SGFDxDeviceName

  • java.lang.Object
    • SecuGen.FDxSDKPro.SGFDxDeviceName

  • public abstract class SGFDxDeviceName
extends java.lang.Object
    This class contains static values for SecuGen finger print device classes. These values are passed as an argument to the JSGFPLib constructor. When the JSGFPLib object is instantiated, the native library is loaded and initialized with the device name passed as an argument.
    See Also:
    JSGFPLib.Init(long)

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static long SG_DEV_AUTO
      Auto-detect attached USB fingerprint sensor.
      static long SG_DEV_FDU03
      SecuGen Hamster Plus fingerprint sensor with USB interface (SDU03P).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU04
      SecuGen Hamster IV FIPS201 Compliant fingerprint sensor with USB interface (SDU04P).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU05
      SecuGen Hamster PRO 20 FAP20 compliant fingerprint sensor with USB interface (U20).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU06
      SecuGen Hamster Pro Fingerprint sensor with USB interface (UPx and UPx-P).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU06AP
      SecuGen Hamster Pro v2 fingerprint sensor with USB interface (UPx-AP).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU07
      SecuGen Hamster PRO 10 FAP10 compliant fingerprint sensor with USB interface (U10).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU08
      FAP20 Compliant SecuGen fingerprint sensor with USB interface - example: USB Hamster PRO 20 (U20-A).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU08A
      FAP20 Compliant SecuGen fingerprint sensor with USB interface - example:Hamster PRO 20 (U20-AP[A]).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU08AL
      FAP20 Compliant SecuGen fingerprint sensor with USB interface - example: HU20-AL OEM Module (U20-AL).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU08P
      SecuGen Hamster PRO 20 AP FAP20 compliant fingerprint sensor with USB interface (U20AP).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU09A
      FAP30 Compliant SecuGen fingerprint sensor with USB interface - example:Hamster PRO 30 (U30-AP[A]).
      static long SG_DEV_FDU10A
      Touchless SecuGen fingerprint sensor with USB interface - example:Hamster Aur (U-AIR).
      static long SG_DEV_U10
      Alternative constant for SG_DEV_FDU07 (U10).
      static long SG_DEV_U20
      Alternative constant for SG_DEV_FDU05 (U20)..
      static long SG_DEV_U20A
      Alternative constant for SG_DEV_FDU08 (U20-A).
      static long SG_DEV_UNKNOWN
      Unknown Device.
      static long SG_DEV_UPX
      Alternative constant for SG_DEV_FDU06 (UPx and UPx-P).

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SGFDxDeviceName()
      This is an abstract class and cannot be instantiated.
